description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly matte gray and black color scheme. The body is constructed with a solid, angular frame, incorporating a hexagonal multi-barrel or magazine section near the front, suggesting a high-capacity or specialized loading mechanism. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced pistol-style handle and a squared-off trigger guard, providing secure handling. The top of the shotgun is equipped with a long, vented rail, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The overall build appears to be a blend of metal and polymer materials, emphasizing durability and modern aesthetics. The design is compact and functional, ideal for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte gray and black finish, featuring a hexagonal front section, ergonomic pistol grip, and a long accessory rail on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal multi-barrel or magazine section and the alignment of the top rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the ergonomic grip, and the vented top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, the trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel and rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1 but from the other side, with clear visibility of the grip and body contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a hexagonal multi-barrel or magazine section and a vented top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with a slight forward extension and integrated finger groove
